dsl_rule.translation_notes: Used dc_upper (Donchian upper band over 5 periods) to represent price breaking above 5-period highest high. Used vol_ratio_20 set to 1.35 (35% above 20-day average) to capture volume expansion threshold. The signal specifies CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction but entry conditions are inherently bullish (new highs + volume expansion), so mapped to LONG. The '50th percentile of recent volume distribution' condition cannot be expressed with available indicators, but vol_ratio_20 >= 1.35 serves as a reasonable volume expansion proxy.

backtest_rule.reason: Used dc_upper (Donchian upper band over 5 periods) to represent price breaking above 5-period highest high. Used vol_ratio_20 set to 1.35 (35% above 20-day average) to capture volume expansion threshold. The signal specifies CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction but entry conditions are inherently bullish (new highs + volume expansion), so mapped to LONG. The '50th percentile of recent volume distribution' condition cannot be expressed with available indicators, but vol_ratio_20 >= 1.35 serves as a reasonable volume expansion proxy.

source_rule_text: A trader should initiate long positions when price enters new highs accompanied by volume expansion of at least 50% above recent average daily volume, as this signals genuine demand and readiness to move higher.
